Attached patch which adds states SUCCEEDED to ServiceState, SUCCEEDED/FAILED to ComponentState.

Earlier ComponentInstance State was marked as STOPPED for all available restart policies. Now it is SUCCEEDED/FAILED depending on the exit status. One pending issue is when there is a graceful stop sent via Client RPC, component instance STATE is not marked as STOPPED. Will fix this in subsequent patch.

For restartPolicy=ON_FAILURE/NEVER, when all component instances terminate, component = SUCCEEDED if all component instances succeed else marked as FAILED.

 # Introduce synchronized boolean getTimelineServiceEnabled method to make this class thread safe.

 # ComponentInstance.java, near line 265, } else {
 # It might be useful to pass in a real diagnostic string to handleComponentInstanceRelaunch to make sure the down stream classes isn't failing to due NPE.

The new state works fine.
Thanks [~eyang] Attached patch with review comments fixed.

Attached patch which adds states SUCCEEDED to ServiceState, SUCCEEDED/FAILED to ComponentState.

Earlier ComponentInstance State was marked as STOPPED for all available restart policies. Now it is SUCCEEDED/FAILED depending on the exit status. One pending issue is when there is a graceful stop sent via Client RPC, component instance STATE is not marked as STOPPED. Will fix this in subsequent patch.

For restartPolicy=ON_FAILURE/NEVER, when all component instances terminate, component = SUCCEEDED if all component instances succeed else marked as FAILED.
